channel.title: Publications on GENIUS
channel.description: Recent content in Publications on GENIUS

item.title: The Future of Generative AI in Software Engineering: A Vision from Industry and Academia in the European GENIUS Project
Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Industry: An Interview Study on Use Cases, Requirements, Challenges, and Evaluation
LESS is More: Guiding LLMs for Formal Requirement and Test Case Generation.
Performance Analysis of Text Chunking Methods for LLM-Based Document Summarization
Compositional Active Learning of Synchronizing Systems Through Automated Alphabet Refinement.
Comparative Analysis of Carbon Footprint in Manual vs. LLM-Assisted Code Development
